content.problemStatement:
Chef has an array AAA consisting of NNN non-negative integers. Chef only likes **non-empty** subarrays having size **at most** KKK.

The happiness Chef gets from a subarray is equal to the **product** of all its elements.

Find the **sum of happiness** of all the subarrays Chef likes. Since the sum can be huge, print it modulo MMM.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
Each test case consists of two lines of input.

The first line of each test case contains three space-separated integers NNN, KKK and MMM ‚ÄĒ the size of input array AAA, the maximum size of subarray Chef likes, and the modulo respectively.
The next line consists of NNN space-separated integers denoting the elements of AAA.




Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line, the sum of happiness of all the subarrays Chef likes modulo MMM.
constraints: The sum of NNN over all test cases won't exceed 3‚čÖ1053 \cdot 10^53‚čÖ105.
